loot.title: Loot boxes
loot.desc: Earn rewards by completing your tasks

1.title: Your daily life, simplified
1.subtitle: Plan meals, share chores, manage shopping

2.title: Track your children's health
2.subtitle: Bottles, diapers, sleep, appointments — everything recorded

3.title: The whole family joins in
3.subtitle: Each member has a profile, kids earn points

children.birthdateHint: The year helps adapt tasks to age (baby, child, teen)

children.noChildHint: No worries! You can add children later in the settings.

vault.title: Vault location
vault.subtitle: Where should your family data be stored? Choose an existing folder or a new empty folder.

templates.title: Starter templates
templates.subtitle: Choose which templates to install in your vault. You can add more later in the settings.

recap.title: Summary
recap.subtitle: Here's your family:

pity.title: 🎯 Guarantee
pity.description: After {{threshold}} rewards without getting Epic or better, the next one is <bold>guaranteed Epic minimum</bold>.

detail.reportFailureMsg: For an abstinence challenge, a failure ends the challenge.

empty.activeSubtitle: Launch a family challenge to motivate everyone
empty.historySubtitle: Completed or failed challenges will appear here.

rdv.questionsHint: Write down your questions before the appointment so you don't forget anything.
rdv.answersHint: Write or dictate the doctor's answers.

note.deleteConfirmMsg: This action is irreversible. Do you really want to delete this note?

toast.titleRequiredMsg: Please enter a title for the note.
toast.invalidUrlMsg: The URL must start with http or https.

profiles.tapToEditHint: Tap a profile to edit the name, avatar, or date of birth.
profiles.pottyTrainedHint: Hides the diaper section from the journal
profiles.deleteProfileMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}'s profile? This action is irreversible.
profiles.dateFormatError: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
profiles.pregnancyToggleHint: Enables pregnancy tracking instead of baby tasks
profiles.ageAdaptHint: The year adapts tasks to age (baby, child, teen)
profiles.bornTasksHint: Pregnancy tasks will be replaced by baby tasks
profiles.welcomeMessage: Tasks and milestones have been updated for the new baby.

grandparents.hint: Share recaps and photos with grandparents via Telegram, WhatsApp, or iMessage.
grandparents.shareSheetHint: Choose the group or contact in the share sheet
grandparents.chatIdHelper: Create a bot via @BotFather, add it to the group, then get the chat ID via the getUpdates API.
grandparents.shareSheetHelper: When sharing, the share sheet will open and you can choose the {{channel}} group or desired contact.

auth.lockHint: Protect on launch with biometrics or PIN
auth.lockDelayHint: Time before the app locks when you leave
auth.disableMessage: The app will no longer be protected on launch.
auth.pinSubtitleSetup: Choose a 4-digit PIN to protect the app.
auth.pinSubtitleVerify: Enter your current PIN to continue.

help.resetHintsAlertMessage: Help bubbles will be shown again on each screen.
help.installAlertMessage:
Install "{{name}}" in your vault?

Existing files will not be overwritten.

vacation.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date.
vacation.endInFuture: End date must be today or later.
vacation.activatedMessage: Head to the Tasks tab to see your checklist.
vacation.deactivateMessage: Normal tasks will be restored. The vacation checklist will be kept.

telegram.missingParamsMsg: Enter the token and chat ID first.
telegram.testFailMsg: Unable to send message. Check the token and chat ID.
telegram.groupTip: For a group: add the bot to the group, send a message, then call getUpdates. The chat ID will be negative.

zen.description: When all conditions are met, the dashboard shows a calm space with a breathing circle and a preview of tomorrow.
zen.sectionsDescription: These sections must be completed or empty to reach zen state.

ai.description: Enable an AI assistant for personalized suggestions and conversational search. Your data stays on your device — only an anonymized summary is sent.
ai.deleteMessage: The AI assistant will be disabled.
ai.keyModalDesc: Paste your Anthropic API key. It will be securely stored on your device.
ai.savedMsg: API key saved. The AI assistant is now active.

gamification.resetMessage: All points, levels, streaks, and loot boxes will be reset to zero. This action is irreversible.

vault.compatHint: Data is stored in standard .md files, compatible with Obsidian.
vault.syncHint: Multi-device sync: place the vault in a Google Drive or Dropbox folder synced locally on each phone.
vault.deleteWarning: Deletes local preferences (API keys, PIN, settings) and unlinks the vault. Your Markdown files are not affected.
vault.deleteMessage:
This will unlink the vault from the app and erase local preferences (API keys, PIN, settings).

Your Markdown files in the vault will not be deleted.
vault.deletedMsg: Restart the app to complete the reset.

notifications.localHint: iOS notifications based on your data. Work even when the app is closed.
notifications.coursesDetail: Every day at {{hour}}:{{minute}} if stock is low
notifications.weeklyAIDetail: Sunday at {{hour}}:{{minute}} · Telegram · API key required

automations.description: The automatic flow connects your recipes, shopping, and stock. Disable individual steps if needed.
automations.recipesToShoppingDetail: Add missing ingredients to shopping when a meal is planned with a recipe
automations.shoppingToStockDetail: Update stock when a food item is checked off the shopping list
automations.cookedToStockDetail: Decrease stock when a meal is marked as cooked
